protocol.name: hyprland_global_shortcuts_v1

interface.name: hyprland_global_shortcuts_manager_v1
interface.description: This interface allows a client to register global keyboard shortcuts that trigger even when the client does not have keyboard focus.

request.name: register_shortcut
request.description:
Register a global shortcut. The shortcut will be fired when the user presses the specified key combination. The compositor will fire the shortcut even if the client does not have keyboard focus.
The id must be unique to the client. The app_id and description are human-readable strings used for UI. The trigger_description is an optional default key combination description (compositor-specific format).

interface.name: hyprland_global_shortcut_v1
interface.description: A registered global keyboard shortcut. The client receives events when the compositor fires the shortcut.

event.name: pressed
event.description: The shortcut was pressed by the user.

event.name: released
event.description: The shortcut was released by the user.
